items.title: MLB 2026 Buzz: Royals' Tyler Tolbert Ties 74-Year Old MLB Record For Consecutive Hits
items.summary: Notable news, notes and buzz from MLB's 2026 season.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: New Zealand confirm four players to hold casual contracts
items.summary: While none of the quartet have featured recently in ODIs they could push for a spot at the 2027 World Cup
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Switzerland beat Colombia on penalties to reach quarter-finals
items.summary: Gregor Kobel is Switzerland's penalty hero, after pulling off a stunning shootout save from Colombia's Cucho Hernandez to help set up a quarter-final clash with Argentina.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
